center.name: James Francis Stephens
center.summary: James Francis Stephens是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Klaas's cuckoo、Green rosella、长嘴凤头百灵，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green rosella or Tasmanian rosella (Platycercus caledonicus) is a species of parrot native to Tasmania and Bass Strait islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Klaas's cuckoo (Chrysococcyx klaas) is a species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae which is native to the wooded regions of sub-Saharan Africa
